title: apowollastonia major
intro: Apowollastonia major, also known as the "Borneo Mountain Rose", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Apowollastonia major include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
